report.summary: No delta since v4 — still on 9cc38d1. Middleware SEO blocker (58/1324 indexable) remains the top P0. 41 uncommitted files in working tree. All 5 cached API routes structurally healthy; /defi-yields still lacks in-memory cache. Page manifest now at 1,215 entries with 0 orphaned slugs (manifest vs disk aligned); 37 dynamic [slug] routes exist outside manifest as expected.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: No new commits since 9cc38d1. No regressions introduced this cycle.

1,252 page.tsx files on disk. Page manifest contains 1,215 entries — 0 orphaned slugs (manifest-to-disk fully aligned). 37 dynamic [slug] routes exist outside manifest as expected (blog, courses, ecosystem, etc).
41 uncommitted files: 7 new OG SVGs, 4 modified OG SVGs, 10 modified learn pages, 2 modified tool components (MarketRecapClient, WhaleTrackerClient), 3 modified tool pages, reports.

Modified learn pages include: crypto-arbitrage, DVT, FOCIL, impermanent-loss, Lido V3 stVaults, liquid-staking-tokens, MiCA, RWA-yield, stablecoins, Sui Hashi — all previously verified at source level.
Network sandbox blocks live HTTP checks — source-level verification only. No build run this cycle (tsc timed out in sandbox).
Build config unchanged: 7GB heap limit, concurrency=4, ignoreBuildErrors=true.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: /api/prices (CoinGecko): HEALTHY — 60s in-memory cache + stale fallback + ISR revalidate=60.
/api/trending (CoinGecko): HEALTHY — 300s in-memory cache + 600s stale-while-revalidate + degraded fallback.
/api/fear-greed (Alternative.me): HEALTHY — 600s in-memory cache + 1200s stale-while-revalidate. Still missing X-Cache-Source headers.
/api/market-metrics (CoinGecko+Alternative.me): BEST — 60s cache + Promise.allSettled + mock fallback + X-Cache HIT/MISS.
/api/market-dominance (CoinGecko): HEALTHY — 300s cache + dual fallback (stale + hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA).
/api/defi-yields (DefiLlama): STILL AT RISK — CACHE_DURATION=300s defined but NO in-memory cache implemented. No fallback data. Direct upstream dependency will 500 on failure.
Rate limiter (src/lib/rate-limiter.ts) exists but only wired into /api/health. All 6 public data routes remain unprotected.
Additional API routes found: /api/news-rss, /api/newsletter, /api/notifications, /api/og, /api/subscribe, /api/standup-email, /api/cache-stats, /api/admin, /api/health.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deploy: 9cc38d1 on Vercel. No new deploys this cycle.

CRITICAL SEO BLOCKER persists: Middleware hardcodes 58 pillar pages in PILLAR_PAGES Set. All other pages get 'noindex, follow' via X-Robots-Tag header. 1,266+ published pages (96%) invisible to Google.
Middleware location: ./middleware.ts (root, 127 lines). Uses Edge Runtime-safe code (no lib imports).
41 uncommitted files in working tree — up from 20 in v4 cycle. Includes 7 new OG SVGs ready for commit.
Security headers properly set: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy.
Cache strategy: pillar pages 1hr/1d/7d, non-pillar 30m/12hr/1d. Both tiers use stale-while-revalidate.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Zero new commits this cycle. Latest commit 9cc38d1 remains HEAD from early today.
CARRY-OVER (P0): Middleware SEO sync — 96% of site invisible to Google. NEEDS JEFE: decision on auto-sync indexing with page-manifest.json vs current 58-page whitelist.
CARRY-OVER (P1): Add in-memory cache + fallback to /api/defi-yields following the pattern used in prices/trending/fear-greed routes.
CARRY-OVER (P2): Wire rate limiter into all 6 public API routes.
CARRY-OVER (P2): Standardize X-Cache-Source headers across all API routes (prices/dominance have them, others don't).
CARRY-OVER (P3): Commit + deploy 41 uncommitted files (7 new OG SVGs, learn page fixes, component updates).
CARRY-OVER (P3): Clean TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts (non-production but noisy).
No blockers resolved since last cycle — all items carried forward unchanged.
